definition.title: Resort on the Road / Life at LineHaul / One Home
definition.objective: Build Resort on the Road as THE dominant content pillar. Feed creative into GA #1 ad campaign for testing. Aspirational lifestyle positioning. Must feel premium, not pitchy.
definition.target_audience: Truck drivers (primary — lifestyle aspiration + dignity), young/prospective drivers (mentorship track), trucker families, carriers evaluating driver retention
definition.cadence: ACTIVE NOW. First batch of lifestyle videos in production. GA #1 ad test imminent. Jeff viral short scripting next.

campaign_card.target_audience: Truck drivers (primary — lifestyle aspiration + dignity), young/prospective drivers (mentorship track), trucker families, carriers evaluating driver retention
campaign_card.campaign_name: Resort on the Road / Life at LineHaul / One Home
key_messages: Resort on the Road — aspirational lifestyle positioning for drivers
$13/day when you use it vs $50 apartment vs $110 hotel vs $65 truck stop
You already live on the road — LHS is your resort

initiatives: Long-form ads (Year of the Trucker format). Sora2 lifestyle videos. Viral shorts (Jeff mentorship). Financial math graphics. Ad campaign fee

_legacy_card.description: CONTENT ACTIVE. Dominant content pillar. Position LHS as aspirational — the place drivers deserve. Two tracks: Lifestyle Aspiration and Driver Dignity. Financial math: $13/day vs $50 apartment vs $110 hotel vs $65 truck stop.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Build Resort on the Road as THE dominant content pillar. Feed creative into GA #1 ad campaign for testing. Aspirational lifestyle positioning. Must feel premium, not pitchy.
_legacy_card.asset_links:
Resort on the Road Videos: New videos reviewed — Anj content plan active.
10 Sora2 Video Prompts: Lifestyle testimonials ready to generate.
Viral Short Scripts: If I Was 18 Again, You're Not Lost, Your First Business.
Podcast Concept: The Trucking Blueprint / CDL Playbook.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: Resort on the Road. The Rig Carlton. $13/day financial comparison. Young driver mentorship. AI-generated resort experience visuals.
_legacy_card.artlist_cost: Sora2 prompts for AI video. Long-form ad production ongoing. Viral shorts need Jeff filming time.
_legacy_card.repurposing: Long-form ads (Year of the Trucker format). Sora2 lifestyle videos. Viral shorts (Jeff mentorship). Financial math graphics. Ad campaign feed. Podcast content.
_legacy_card.timeline: ACTIVE NOW. First batch of lifestyle videos in production. GA #1 ad test imminent. Jeff viral short scripting next.
